svg.title: Metrics lines refreshing
svg.desc: Temporary fallback while the metrics workflow regenerates recent code lines and repository activity.
svg.text: The previous render returned an empty panel, so this fallback is shown until the next Metrics workflow run.
After a push to master or the scheduled run, this panel will show lines changed, active repositories, and recent diff history.
If it still stays empty, the token likely lacks enough repository access for this plugin.
